LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ARAMEX RESTAURANT INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION STATES THAT A MEET-AND-CONFER "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" HAS NOT OCCURRED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND ARAMEX'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 9, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARAMEX RESTAURANT INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 430.41. Counsel's declaration states that a meet-and-confer "in person or by telephone" has not occurred. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and Aramex's response to the complaint is now due by July 9, 2021.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
